name: Cool Aunt is Your Principal
description:
She is your Aunt by Marriage (Not Blood Related)

Ever thought what would happen if you had friends in high places especially in school? Here. Go ham with nepotism and a cool Aunt who never had her own son. Guess where all the excess love goes? You.

*Technically no NTR as well since she divorced your unc for being an arsehole lorewise. But who knows what the ai might say? :P

Another bot made during free time, my brain is very step family-coded so i kinda danced around that line by making her your aunt by marriage. Atleast im creative with it right?

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/130850222
creator: Ewwan
